# Stripe

> [!gap] This is a stub page. Expand when Stripe integration work begins.

Stripe is the payments platform referenced in the Gunner software suite roadmap for handling invoicing and payment processing within the white-label SaaS offering.

## Status

- Referenced in [[gunner/software-suite]] as an external integration (not rebuilt internally)
- Stripe API Reference PDF available in `raw-sources/articles/Stripe API Reference.pdf`

## Planned Use

- Customer invoicing for roofing jobs
- Partner billing for white-label licensees
- Integrated at the platform layer (masterdb), not per-tenant

## Source Material

- `raw-sources/articles/Stripe API Reference.pdf` — API reference (not yet ingested)
